x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Discovery-sourced install data ensures Now Assist SAM AI analysis is based on accurate, current software inventory. Without automated discovery, AI recommendations are based on potentially stale or incomplete manual data, reducing the reliability of license optimization suggestions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No software install records found", finding: "No software install records found. Discovery integration cannot be assessed." }; } var gaDisc = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaDisc.addQuery("discovery_source", "!=", ""); gaDisc.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaDisc.query(); var withDisc = gaDisc.next() ? parseInt(gaDisc.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withDisc / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of installs have a discovery source (" + withDisc + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of software installs have a discovery source. Now Assist SAM AI analysis is based on accurate, automatically discovered software data." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of installs have a discovery source (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations may be based on incomplete or manually entered data." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of installs have a discovery source. Now Assist SAM AI recommendations cannot be trusted without automated discovery feeding accurate install data." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure ServiceNow Discovery or an integrated discovery tool to automatically populate software install records. Manual install data is unreliable for AI analysis. Navigate to Discovery > Administration to configure software discovery.
